title: OKR workflow for 2024
excerpt: Hi everyone, I’m head of the monday spaces team and although this all starts out smelling of promotion, I’m actually writing this because I came across this awesome workspace and I thought it will be useful to folks with…

posts.author: yadinkatz (Yadin Katz)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone, I’m head of the monday spaces team and although this all starts out smelling of promotion, I’m actually writing this because I came across this awesome workspace and I thought it will be useful to folks with their OKR planning for next year. Let me know if you’ve benefited from it. Enjoy! OKR Workflow

posts.author: JessMergen (Jessica Mergen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @yadinkatz - thanks for posting this. I’ve been checking out all the Monday Spaces, and specifically regarding OKR and Goal tracking. As a result, I actually have a question for you on the Monday Spaces concept. Some of them are really great! But they appear to need years of experience and expert level knowledge and skills on features to use them. Is there any plan to add a requirement that each space come with a work doc to help get you started using it?
Thanks!
